---
title: "Privacy Policy"
body-classes: "ed-page"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-tools: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script type="text/javascript" src="/assets/scripts/privacy/privacyForm.js" defer></script>
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Privacy</p>
    <h1>Privacy policy</h1>
    <p class="l-lede">
      How this site handles the small amount of data it collects, and how
      to reach me with questions.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="l-section first">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-prose">

      <h2>What is collected</h2>
      <p>Two categories of data:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Anonymous usage data.</strong> Pages visited, time on page,
            and basic device or browser info, gathered through Google
            Analytics. No personally identifying information is captured
            here.</li>
        <li><strong>Voluntary information.</strong> Anything you choose to
            send me via the contact form on this page — your name, email,
            and message.</li>
      </ul>

      <h2>How it is used</h2>
      <p>Anonymous metrics inform navigation, content, and performance
        improvements. Voluntary information is used only to reply to you.
        Data is never sold or shared with third parties beyond the analytics
        processors that produce aggregate counts.</p>

      <h2>Cookies</h2>
      <p>Cookies on this site support analytics and session continuity.
        They do not collect personal data. You can opt out with the cookie
        banner on first visit, browser settings, or the
        <a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Analytics opt-out extension</a>.</p>

      <h2>Your choices</h2>
      <p>You can request deletion or modification of anything you have
        submitted by contacting me. You can also disable analytics at any
        time via the cookie banner or browser settings.</p>

      <h2>Scope</h2>
      <p>This policy covers this site only. Linked third-party sites are
        governed by their own policies.</p>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Contact</p>
    <h2>Questions about this policy?</h2>
    <p class="l-lede">
      Use the form below for privacy questions, suggestions on the policy,
      or anything else worth a longer message.
    </p>

    <iframe id="policyFormTarget" name="policyFormTarget" title="Form submission target" style="display:none;border:0;"></iframe>

    <form id="policyForm" class="l-form"
          target="policyFormTarget"
          action="https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwgvahSl92clLNtOoVs2yGhfninvTex3DbRFvOTDy9TSWVFuIgJ1L3BduhLu4EemVQ/exec"
          method="POST"
          autocomplete="on"
          novalidate>

      <input type="hidden" name="_next" value="https://www.datascienceyapper.com/content/forms/thank-you/">
      <input type="hidden" name="referrer" value="">
      <input type="hidden" name="userAgent" value="">
      <input type="hidden" name="formLoadedAt" value="">

      <!-- Honeypot fields: invisible to humans, frequently filled by bots -->
      <div class="hp-trap" aria-hidden="true">
        <label for="hp_website">Website</label>
        <input type="text" id="hp_website" name="website" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="hp_phone">Phone</label>
        <input type="text" id="hp_phone" name="phone" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">
      </div>

      <div class="l-form-group">
        <label class="l-form-label" for="firstName">First name</label>
        <input class="l-form-input" type="text" id="firstName" name="firstName"
               required maxlength="60" autocomplete="given-name" placeholder="First name">
      </div>

      <div class="l-form-group">
        <label class="l-form-label" for="lastName">Last name</label>
        <input class="l-form-input" type="text" id="lastName" name="lastName"
               required maxlength="60" autocomplete="family-name" placeholder="Last name">
      </div>

      <div class="l-form-group">
        <label class="l-form-label" for="profession">Profession</label>
        <select class="l-form-select" id="profession" name="profession" required>
          <option value="">Select…</option>
          <option value="Student">Student</option>
          <option value="Instructor or Professor">Instructor / Professor</option>
          <option value="Recruiter">Recruiter</option>
          <option value="Professional">Professional</option>
          <option value="Other">Other</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="l-form-group">
        <label class="l-form-label" for="email">Email</label>
        <input class="l-form-input" type="email" id="email" name="_replyto"
               required maxlength="120" inputmode="email" autocomplete="email"
               placeholder="you@example.com">
      </div>

      <div class="l-form-group">
        <label class="l-form-label" for="message">Message</label>
        <textarea class="l-form-textarea" id="message" name="message"
                  required maxlength="3000" rows="6"
                  placeholder="What's on your mind?"></textarea>
      </div>

      <!--
        Cloudflare Turnstile (optional but recommended).
        To enable: get a site key at https://dash.cloudflare.com/?to=/:account/turnstile
        and replace REPLACE_WITH_TURNSTILE_SITEKEY below. The Turnstile script
        is loaded by privacyForm.js when a site key is present.
      -->
      <div class="cf-turnstile" data-sitekey="REPLACE_WITH_TURNSTILE_SITEKEY" data-theme="light"></div>

      <p id="policyFormStatus" class="l-form-status" role="status" aria-live="polite"></p>

      <button id="policyFormSubmit" class="l-form-submit" type="submit">Send message</button>

      <p class="l-form-note">
        I'll reply directly to the email you provide. Your data is used only
        to respond — see above for details.
      </p>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
